welcome_title: YOUR OLD PHONE IS SOMEONE'S FUTURE.
welcome_subtitle: The minerals in your drawer could power the next decade of innovation. We make sure they do.
digitize_drawer_desc: Snap a photo of your old tech. Our AI identifies components and estimates the raw material value in seconds.
free_pickup_desc: Schedule a time. Our carbon-neutral fleet arrives to collect your items, no packaging required.
earn_credits_desc: Once processed, receive credits instantly in your wallet. Spend them with our sustainable partners or cash out.
